verdicts.reasoning: The homepage describes Gladly as a customer service platform that centralizes customer conversations, aligning with the recorded description.
The URL for authentication methods returns a 404 error, making it impossible to verify the claim about authentication methods.
The help center confirms that developers can generate API tokens from the product UI without contacting sales, supporting the claim of self-serve access.
The API documentation lists many REST endpoints, confirming the broad REST coverage claimed in the record.
The availability of public REST documentation and self-serve API token generation supports the claim that integration and development are possible today.
